judgment.summary: A high-growth company with strong gross margins and cash flow, though currently struggling with negative operating and net margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 1.01 beat the 0.90 estimate (12.6% surprise); next earnings date is 2026-05-26.
positives: Gross margin 76.6% — high profitability on cost of goods.
Free cash flow (TTM) $1.02B — robust cash generation.
Total cash $3.51B vs $1.87B debt — strong net cash position.
negatives: Profit margin -2.3% — company is not yet profitable.
Operating margin -6.2% — business is operating at a loss.
Price/Book 11.44 — high valuation relative to book value.

news.paragraph: Zscaler is seeing positive momentum from rising Z-Flex adoption and a new partnership with IXT that expands its zero trust infrastructure opportunities. Traders should monitor the potential for Z-Flex to act as a new revenue growth catalyst following a recent 24% monthly surge in share price. The company continues to be recognized as a high-growth, cash-heavy stock in the technology sector.
